description_long: This is a modern detached house set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a white and wood-accented exterior with a prominent gable roof. The property includes a paved driveway with parking for multiple cars, landscaped gardens with trees and shrubs, and a small outbuilding or shed. The main house has large windows, a front porch with steps, and a wooden deck area for outdoor seating. The backyard is spacious, with additional greenery and a patio area for relaxation or entertaining. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open green spaces, and a blend of natural and contemporary materials.
description: A modern, white and wood-accented house with a gable roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a fenced yard with driveway and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, parked cars, and symmetrical rows of trees lining the walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall gable roof, side patio, and the small outbuilding adjacent to the main house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, additional greenery, and the back facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, more trees, and the side of the house with visible entryway and garden beds.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wooden door, steps, a small porch, and is flanked by landscaped planters and trees.
